description: Evaluation cases for the s3d-solution-setup SKILL.md — verifies trigger discovery, input gathering (Step 0), and all scaffolding phases (1–5).

cases.description: Explicit ClientCommands request should load the skill
cases.prompt: Create a new ClientCommands project for Equipment
cases.expectedBehavior: Skill is invoked; agent runs Step 0 to resolve component root and gather GUIDs before creating any files.
cases.mustNotDo: Create files before completing Step 0 input gathering.

cases.description: Explicit Client request should load the skill
cases.prompt: Set up a new Client solution for SpaceManagement
cases.expectedBehavior: Skill is invoked; ProjectSuffix is set to 'Client'; RootPath ends with '\Client'.
cases.mustNotDo: Default to ClientCommands suffix when user explicitly asks for Client.

cases.description: Component name alone (without suffix) should still load the skill
cases.expectedBehavior: Skill is invoked; agent asks/infers ProjectSuffix (defaults to ClientCommands if not determinable from codebase).
cases.mustNotDo: Ignore the request or create a generic project without following the skill workflow.

cases.description: 'create new solution' phrasing should load the skill
cases.prompt: create new solution for the Structure component
cases.expectedBehavior: Skill is invoked; Step 0 runs the PowerShell root-search script against G:\KRoot, G:\MRoot, G:\SRoot.
cases.mustNotDo: Search paths outside G:\KRoot, G:\MRoot, G:\SRoot.

cases.description: Root search must follow KRoot → MRoot → SRoot priority order
cases.expectedBehavior: PowerShell script searches G:\KRoot first, then G:\MRoot, then G:\SRoot; uses the first root that contains '<Component>\Client'.
cases.mustNotDo: Search roots in any other order or skip any root.

cases.description: binaryDrive must map correctly from found root
cases.prompt: New ClientCommands solution for PipingLayout (located in G:\MRoot)
cases.expectedBehavior: binaryDrive is assigned 'M:\'; OutputFolder in all UnitTesting scripts begins with 'M:\'.
cases.mustNotDo: Use a hardcoded drive letter that does not correspond to the found root.

cases.description: Fallback to G:\SRoot when component is not found in any root
cases.prompt: Set up ClientCommands for BrandNewComponent (does not exist yet)
cases.expectedBehavior: Script falls back to 'G:\SRoot\BrandNewComponent'; binaryDrive is 'S:\'.
cases.mustNotDo: Fail or throw an error when the component folder does not exist.

cases.description: Five unique GUIDs must be generated before creating any file
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent runs '[System.Guid]::NewGuid()' five times and assigns GUID-1…GUID-5 before Phase 1.
cases.mustNotDo: Reuse GUIDs from a prior solution or hard-code placeholder GUIDs.

cases.description: ProjectSuffix inference: ClientCommands when Commands folder exists
cases.prompt: Set up project for Equipment (existing ClientCommands.sln found in Commands folder)
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent detects '*ClientCommands.sln' via PowerShell and sets ProjectSuffix = 'ClientCommands'.
cases.mustNotDo: Override the detected suffix with a conflicting one.

cases.description: Namespace derivation for ClientCommands
cases.expectedBehavior: Namespace is set to 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client.Commands'.
cases.mustNotDo: Use 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.ClientCommands' or any other incorrect namespace pattern.

cases.description: Namespace derivation for Client suffix
cases.expectedBehavior: Namespace is set to 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client'; RootPath ends with '\Equipment\Client'.
cases.mustNotDo: Use '\Equipment\Client\Commands' as RootPath for a Client-only project.

cases.description: Solution file must be placed at the correct path
cases.expectedBehavior: Solution file is created at '<RootPath>\EquipmentClientCommands\EquipmentClientCommands.sln'.
cases.mustNotDo: Place the .sln in the root of <RootPath> without the <Component><ProjectSuffix> subfolder.

cases.description: Test project must declare ProjectDependencies on main project in solution
cases.expectedBehavior: The test project section in the .sln contains a 'ProjectSection(ProjectDependencies) = postProject' block referencing {GUID-1}.
cases.mustNotDo: Omit the ProjectDependencies section from the test project entry.

cases.description: SolutionGuid in ExtensibilityGlobals must use GUID-2
cases.expectedBehavior: The ExtensibilityGlobals section contains 'SolutionGuid = {GUID-2}' where GUID-2 is freshly generated.
cases.mustNotDo: Use GUID-1, GUID-4, or any other GUID in the SolutionGuid field.

cases.description: Four subfolders must be created under the main project
cases.expectedBehavior: Folders 'Localizers', 'ViewModels', 'Properties', 'Resources' are created inside the main project folder.
cases.mustNotDo: Omit any of the four required subdirectories.

cases.description: RootNamespace and AssemblyName must be correctly set in .csproj
cases.expectedBehavior: RootNamespace = 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client.Commands'; AssemblyName = 'EquipmentClientCommands'.
cases.mustNotDo: Mix up RootNamespace and AssemblyName or use an incorrect namespace.

cases.description: Localizer class name and ResourceManager base name must be correct
cases.expectedBehavior: Class is named 'EquipmentClientLocalizer' in namespace 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client.Commands.Localizers'; ResourceManager base name is 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client.Commands.Resources.EquipmentClientCommands'.
cases.mustNotDo: Name the class 'EquipmentClientCommandsLocalizer' or use an incorrect ResourceManager base name.

cases.description: Resource file name must match <Component><ProjectSuffix>.en-US.resx
cases.expectedBehavior: File is created as 'EquipmentClientCommands.en-US.resx'; generated Resources class namespace is 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client.Commands.Resources'.
cases.mustNotDo: Name the file 'EquipmentClientCommandsResources.resx' or omit the '.en-US' locale segment.

cases.description: Client project must check for companion Client DLL hint path
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent verifies whether SpaceManagementClient.dll exists under Debug\ vs Debug\NetCore\ before adding the HintPath.
cases.mustNotDo: Blindly add a NetCore HintPath without checking the actual DLL location.

cases.description: Test project RootNamespace must include .Tests suffix
cases.expectedBehavior: RootNamespace = 'Ingr.SP3D.Equipment.Client.Commands.Tests'; AssemblyName = 'EquipmentClientCommandsTests'.
cases.mustNotDo: Use the main project namespace without the '.Tests' suffix.

cases.description: All assembly references in test project must have Private=False and SpecificVersion=False
cases.expectedBehavior: Every <Reference> element in the .csproj contains both <Private>False</Private> and <SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>.
cases.mustNotDo: Leave Private or SpecificVersion as their defaults or set them to True.

cases.description: Test project must have a ProjectReference to the main project with Private=False
cases.expectedBehavior: A <ProjectReference> pointing to 'EquipmentClientCommands.csproj' exists with <Private>False</Private>.
cases.mustNotDo: Omit the ProjectReference or leave Private set to True.

cases.description: AssemblyInfo.cs for test project must use a freshly generated GUID
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent runs '[guid]::NewGuid()' and inserts the result as the assembly GUID in the test project's AssemblyInfo.cs.
cases.mustNotDo: Reuse GUID-1 through GUID-5 or leave a placeholder string like 'NEW_GUID'.

cases.description: UnitTests ps1 file must be named <Component><ProjectSuffix>UnitTests.ps1
cases.prompt: Create Equipment ClientCommands unit test script
cases.expectedBehavior: File is created as 'EquipmentClientCommandsUnitTests.ps1' in '<ComponentRoot>\Testing\UnitTesting\'.
cases.mustNotDo: Name the file 'EquipmentUnitTests.ps1' or place it in a different folder.

cases.description: OutputFolder in UnitTests ps1 must use the correct binaryDrive
cases.prompt: Create Equipment ClientCommands unit test script (component is in G:\MRoot)
cases.expectedBehavior: OutputFolder is 'M:\Equipment\Testing\UnitTesting\UnitTestResults'.
cases.mustNotDo: Hardcode 'G:\' or use the wrong virtual drive letter.

cases.description: UnitTestsSetup.bat must only be created if not already present
cases.prompt: Add ClientCommands scripts when UnitTestsSetup.bat already exists
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent skips creating UnitTestsSetup.bat; only appends the new '+$powershell' line to UnitTests.bld.
cases.mustNotDo: Overwrite an existing UnitTestsSetup.bat.

cases.description: UnitTests.bld must append new ps1 line after last existing +$powershell line when file exists
cases.prompt: Add ClientCommands scripts when UnitTests.bld already has a Client entry
cases.expectedBehavior: New '+$powershell <ComponentRoot>\Testing\UnitTesting\EquipmentClientCommandsUnitTests.ps1' is inserted after the last '+$powershell' line.
cases.mustNotDo: Add the new line before existing test lines or duplicate existing entries.

cases.description: UnitTestingSummary.ps1 must only be created if not already present
cases.prompt: Create Equipment ClientCommands scripts (UnitTestingSummary.ps1 already exists)
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent skips creating UnitTestingSummary.ps1.
cases.mustNotDo: Overwrite an existing UnitTestingSummary.ps1.

cases.description: Build must run dotnet restore then dotnet build
cases.prompt: Build the Equipment ClientCommands solution after scaffolding
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent runs 'dotnet restore' and then 'dotnet build --configuration Debug' from '<RootPath>\EquipmentClientCommands'.
cases.mustNotDo: Skip dotnet restore or run build from an incorrect working directory.

cases.description: Duplicate assembly attribute error should be resolved by removing attributes from AssemblyInfo.cs
cases.prompt: Build fails with CS0579 Duplicate AssemblyCompany attribute
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent removes AssemblyCompany, AssemblyProduct, and AssemblyCopyright from AssemblyInfo.cs, as they are provided by X:\Bldtools\S3DVersionAssemblyInfo.cs.
cases.mustNotDo: Remove the X:\Bldtools link or comment out the conflicting attributes without removing them.

cases.description: Paths must be resolved via PowerShell — no user-supplied strings used directly as file paths
cases.expectedBehavior: Agent validates component name against the actual codebase via PowerShell before constructing any path.
cases.mustNotDo: Construct file system paths by concatenating raw user input without validation.
